title: Anthropic's landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved | TechCrunch
summary: While the final approval closes out this case, it doesn’t settle the legal question industry-wide because Alsup’s ruling was a single district court decision, and Anthropic’s decision to settle means the case will never reach an appeals court to become binding precedent.
